portfolio_summary.overall_market_view: Selective risk-on in a Fear environment (F&G=32). BTC leads with record institutional inflows and exchange reserves at 7-year lows. XRP and LINK offer the best alt risk-reward backed by regulatory clarity and real enterprise adoption. ETH coiled for short-squeeze above $2,400. DOT, MATIC, SOL, and AVAX are either bearish/trendless/no-data and are skipped or held flat. Maintain elevated cash given macro uncertainty (FOMC April 28-29, tariff risks).

BTC-USD.reasoning: Highest-conviction long in the portfolio. Institutional demand is structurally overwhelming: Strategy $2.54B single-week purchase, ETF inflows $663M/day (first monthly net inflow after 4 months of outflows), exchange reserves at 7-year lows (2.21M BTC). US Strategic Bitcoin Reserve announcement within ~2 months and CLARITY Act markup imminent are catalysts. Fear & Greed at 32 is historically prime accumulation territory. Daily trend intact (EMAs aligned, ADX 31.6). Funding rates neutral-to-negative — not an overcrowded trade. Hourly RSI was 92 at ~$78,989, so entering on the pullback to $76,500 rather than chasing. 8/9 strategies bullish. Stop below $74,000 (prior support). R/R 3.8x meets criteria. Position sized at ~20% of capital (blue-chip allocation).

ETH-USD.reasoning: Bullish with moderate conviction. Institutional accumulation is substantial: Bitmine 101,627 ETH (~$230M), ETH Foundation largest-ever staking deposit (22,517 ETH), 8 consecutive days of ETH ETF inflows ($493.7M total). Exchange reserves at record lows. Funding slightly negative = short-squeeze setup if $2,400 breaks. Pectra upgrade live. Price at $2,370 entry gives a defined risk structure: 5.5% stop, 13.9% target, 2.5x R/R (meets minimum). 5/9 strategies bullish. Key risks: ETH/BTC ratio at multi-year lows, KelpDAO DeFi hack overhang. Sized at ~16.5% of capital — smaller than BTC reflecting lower conviction and ETH/BTC headwinds.

SOL-USD.reasoning: Head Trader neutral at 38% confidence (below 40% threshold). R/R 1.8x on the Head Trader's setup fails the 2:1 minimum rule. Daily ADX only 13.8 — no trend. EMAs not aligned. Whale depositing 51,750 SOL to Binance is a bearish near-term signal. $270M Drift exploit weighs on sentiment. Record on-chain metrics are disconnected from price. Wait for confirmed break above $95 with volume before entering. Skipping.

BNB-USD.reasoning: Head Trader neutral at 48% confidence with R/R exactly 2.0x — borderline. Daily EMAs not aligned for uptrend (EMA10 < EMA50). ADX 22.8 below 25 threshold. Hourly RSI 87 and Z-score +2.30 signal near-term overbought requiring a pullback to $635 entry. 71.9% long ratio in perpetuals creates amplified downside risk if support breaks. Waiting for confirmed daily EMA fan and pullback to $635 before entering. Skipping this cycle.

XRP-USD.reasoning: Strongest regulatory story among alts: SEC-CFTC March 2026 ruling formally classified XRP as digital commodity, removing the primary multi-year overhang. 7 live spot XRP ETFs with $55.39M weekly inflow streak confirm institutional demand. 62% supply held by whale wallets at 5-year exchange-balance lows = supply squeeze setup. ADX 32.6 confirms real trend. 7/9 strategies bullish — widest consensus in the alt space. R/R 2.2x meets criteria. Key risks: Ripple escrow releases 1B XRP monthly (dilution), funding rates rising to 0.008% (longs building). Sized at ~17% of capital — second largest allocation given strong regulatory tailwinds and diversification benefit (payments sector vs BTC/ETH store-of-value and smart contracts).

ADA-USD.reasoning: Head Trader neutral at 42% confidence. Daily EMA downtrend confirmed. 5 of 9 strategies bearish on technicals vs. 3 bullish on fundamentals/catalyst. Van Rossem hard fork is a binary catalyst — could be 'sell the news'. Momentum ranker rates ADA as weakest (rank 8/9). Entering against a confirmed downtrend requires breakout confirmation above $0.27 resistance. Skipping until technical structure improves.

AVAX-USD.reasoning: Head Trader neutral at 44% confidence. R/R on Head Trader's setup is 1.6x — fails the 2:1 minimum. Daily ADX 12.7 confirms no trend. 9/9 strategies neutral (no bullish, no bearish consensus). Although deeply negative funding (-0.03% to -0.05%) creates squeeze potential, a catalyst is required and none is imminent. Bitwise staking ETF is a positive but insufficient standalone trigger. Enter only on confirmed breakout above $10.50 with volume. Skipping.

DOT-USD.reasoning: Clear skip — bearish signal from Head Trader (62% confidence bearish), 7/9 strategies bearish. Head Trader's short setup (entry $1.30, target $1.15, stop $1.38) has R/R of 1.9x which fails the 2:1 minimum for opening a new short position. Daily EMA downtrend confirmed, 6.4% below 50-SMA, all-time BTC-relative lows. Hyperbridge exploit (fake 1B DOT minted on Ethereum April 13) is reputational damage. Crypto short positions also carry squeeze risk given negative funding. No trade in either direction.

MATIC-USD.reasoning: Delisted — MATIC-USD migrated to POL-USD (Polygon 2.0 rebrand) by March 26, 2026. No price data available on yfinance. Cannot establish entry, target, or stop levels. Skip as instructed.

LINK-USD.reasoning: Highest fundamental-to-price divergence in the portfolio. 1.2M LINK withdrawn from exchanges in 48 hours is a very strong on-chain accumulation signal. $68T OpenAssets tokenization partnership represents LINK's core use case scaling to institutional magnitude. CCIP zero-hack record is a critical trust differentiator post-KelpDAO — 'Chainlink is what DeFi should be' narrative. SWIFT + 100 banks + Deutsche Bank bond settlement live usage accelerating. Data Streams expanded to US equities April 12. Crypto sentiment bullish at 70% confidence (highest of all alts). 5/9 strategies bullish driven by fundamental/catalyst signals. R/R 2.6x meets criteria. Stop at $8.85 (prior swing low support). ADX 22.4 is the main risk (weak trend). Sized at ~18% of capital — infrastructure sector diversification complements L1 positions.
